question: Implement Xavier initialization for a Linear layer. Use nn.init.xavier_uniform_ to initialize weights and nn.init.zeros_ for bias.
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

layer = nn.Linear(10, 20)
nn.init.???_(layer.weight)
nn.init.???_(layer.bias)
print(f"Weight mean: {layer.weight.mean().item():.4f}")
print(f"Weight std: {layer.weight.std().item():.2f}")
print(f"Bias: {layer.bias.item():.1f}")
